isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Intro: Anderson .Paak]
That bass, that shape, that walk, I'ma need that (Give it to me)
That taste, that waist, that uh, that pretty ass face, I'ma need that (Give it to me)
That toxic mean girl drama, comma (Ooh), I'ma need that (Give it to me)
That taste, that waist, that uh, that pretty ass face, I'ma need that (Incoming)

[Verse 1: DEAN, Anderson .Paak]
I feel the passion in here comin' alive, strawberry wine
This turnin' me on more than a fever
It's more than I need, yeah (Come on)
Every time you leave a trace (Say that)

[Pre-Chorus: DEAN]
I just need a hit, baby, you I crave
Kinda hard for me to behave, where you goin'?
Where you goin'? Feels that I just can't phase
So know that I ain't goin' away (Whoa)

[Chorus: DEAN]
I want your aftertaste
You bite your lip, I'm on your waist
You call, I run, don't need a break
I wanna taste, I wanna taste that
I want your aftertaste
Five star, three course, Michelin plate
All day, all night, all over me
I want your aftertaste

[Post-Chorus: Anderson .Paak]
That bass, that shape, that walk, I'ma need that (Come on, give it to me)
That taste, that waist, that uh, that pretty ass face, I'ma need that (Tell me I need it)

[Verse 2: Anderson .Paak]
Runnin' through the city, where you at with it? (Where you going, baby?)
Pretty with an attitude to match with it (Uh-huh)
You a good girl, but you bad with it (Bad)
So every time you leave, I can't handle it (Don't go)
I just wanna come over and dismantle it
Two-tone, two-tone in the driveway
Daddy home, it's too long since you saw me
I've been lookin' for you like a treasure map
Promise I'ma get you wetter than the weather app

[Pre-Chorus: DEAN]
I just need a hit, baby, you I crave
Kinda hard for me to behave, where you goin'?
Where you goin'? Feels that I just can't phase
So know that ain't goin' away, yeah

[Chorus: DEAN]
I want your aftertaste
You bite your lip, I'm on your waist
You call, I run, don't need a break
I wanna taste, I wanna taste that
I want your aftertaste
Five star, three course, Michelin plate
All day, all night, all over me
I want your aftertaste

[Post-Chorus: Anderson .Paak, DEAN]
That bass, that shape, that walk, I'ma need that (Give it to me)
That taste, that waist, that uh, that pretty ass face, I'ma need that (Give it to me)
That toxic mean girl drama, comma (Ooh), I'ma need that (Give it to me)
That taste, that waist, that uh, that pretty ass face, I'ma need that (I want your aftertaste)

[Bridge: Anderson .Paak, DEAN]
I want your aftertaste
I need it, gotta have it, girl, I want your aftertaste
So know that I ain’t going away

[Chorus: DEAN]
I want your aftertaste
You bite your lip, I'm on your waist (Ooh)
You call, I run, don't need a break
I wanna taste, I wanna taste that
I want your aftertaste
Five star, three course, Michelin plate (Yeah)
All day, all night, all over me
I want your aftertaste (I really gotta know)

[Outro: DEAN]
I want your aftertaste
You bite your lip, I'm on your waist
You call, I run, don't need a break (You know what?)
I wanna taste, I wanna taste that (I think we got another one)
I want your aftertaste
Five star, three course, Michelin plate (We got another one)
All day, all night, all over me
I want your aftertaste (Ooh, yeah)
